title: Unknown Resonance
storyPurpose: Codex scan fails; UNKNOWN RESONANCE / NO MATCH FOUND lettered into image.

panels.description: Mira holds a palm Codex crystal toward Spark (still behind Bramblefox). Soft scan light washes markings. scan light washes Spark's markings.

Original Riftwilds IP only. Warm earth greens, sandstone, timber, moss first; cyan rift energy and amber hearth as accents only. NO purple AI-fantasy default.
